name: entities
title: Entities
description: A distinct set of books -- a business or household under one login. Owner-scoped (owner_id = the login that owns this set of books), a faithful port of the predecessor's Entity model (its `user` FK), adapted to this system's owner_id convention. `entity_id` on the finance/commerce collections points INTO this collection -- a scoping FK, not composition (plan/vocabulary/65-multi-entity-spec.md). Multi-currency FX, inter-entity transactions, and cross-entity consolidation are out of scope; base_currency is stored (home currency for reports) but not converted. mode drives the chart-of-accounts auto-seed (simple = income+expense; standard/double_entry = the full standard chart).

fields.name: owner_id
fields.label: Owner
fields.help: The login that owns this set of books.

fields.name: mode
fields.label: Mode
fields.help: Simple = income/expense only; standard/double_entry = full chart of accounts.

fields.name: base_currency
fields.label: Base Currency
fields.help: Home currency for this entity's reports and totals. Stored, not FX-converted (multi-currency is out of scope for v1).

fields.name: project_id
fields.label: Project
fields.help: Optional: link this set of books to a project.
